PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-25-2023 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-03-2023 Continued To Sep-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Tate for Leslie Anderson Adams (executor).
Ross Madden appeared by zoom for Gregory Crowe (objector/beneficiary).

The court stated that there is an issue with notice, that the inventory and appraisal ("I & A") needs to be corrected and that there is no specific amount of the non-cash assets. Mr. Tate stated that the accounting is being prepared, that he will fix the I & A, and that he does not think they need a probate referee because there are just accounts and no real property. Mr. Tate also stated that there is a stock that is worth about $1,500.00, that he asked the accountant when the accountant would be completed, but he did not get an answer, and requested a one-month continuance. Mr. Tate also raised the issue of Mr. Crowe having not complied with the order in the trust matter to deposit the $700,000.00 in a blocked account, Mr. Crowe having only done a partial accounting when he was ordered to do a full accounting, perhaps getting a judgment against Mr. Crowe, and stated that he thinks he has gotten all he's going to get out Mr. Crowe and that he may have to go to trial. The court informed Mr. Tate that it can only address what is before it. Mr. Madden stated that there are a lot of procedural errors in Mr. Tate's petition, and they should be corrected. The court stated that service needs to be provided to all interested parties, that the inventory and appraisal needs to be corrected, and proposed continuing the matter to allow the petition to be supplemented. The Petition to Approve the Status Report, etc. is continued to September 25, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

Off Calendar Aug-08-2022 Continued To Sep-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Tate appeared by zoom for Petitioners.
Ross Madden appeared by zoom for and with Gregory Crowe (Contestant) by zoom.

The Parties provided history and presented oral argument to support their positions as to whether or not the appointment of Leslie Anderson-Adams is appropriate. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated July 16, 2016 is admitted to probate. Leslie Anderson-Adams is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for August 8, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
